name: Arcus Biosciences, Inc.
summary: PART I Company Overview We are a late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing differentiated molecules for patients with cancer and inflammatory and autoimmune diseases. Our most advanced molecules are in Phase 3 registrational studies for various cancer indications and we expect our next wave of clinical-stage molecules to come from our inflammation and autoimmune disease programs.
